channel.title: Siege Analytics
channel.description: Spatial intelligence, polling, and data engineering for campaigns, nonprofits, and public-interest organizations.

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: dheeraj
item.content:encoded: Siege Analytics turns location data into decisions. We build precinct boundaries from raw address files, design polls that treat every community as a first language, and engineer the pipelines that connect field teams to the numbers that matter.
item.excerpt:encoded: Spatial intelligence, polling, and data engineering for campaigns, nonprofits, and public-interest organizations.

item.title: Services
item.dc:creator: dheeraj
item.content:encoded: Seven practice areas -- fractional CTO, spatial intelligence, polling and research, political financial analysis, data engineering, software engineering, and GIS training -- each grounded in the principle that good decisions start with good geometry.
item.excerpt:encoded: Fractional CTO, spatial intelligence, polling, data engineering, and more.

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: dheeraj
item.content:encoded: Siege Analytics is a 100% minority-owned data consultancy based in Austin, Texas, working remotely across five continents. Founded by Dheeraj Chand, we specialize in spatial intelligence, polling, and data engineering for campaigns, nonprofits, and public-interest organizations.
item.excerpt:encoded: 100% minority-owned data consultancy based in Austin, Texas. Spatial intelligence, polling, and engineering.

item.title: Contact
item.dc:creator: dheeraj
item.content:encoded: Every engagement starts with a scoping conversation -- no deck, no pitch. You describe the decision you are trying to make; we tell you honestly whether a spatial, statistical, or engineering approach fits, and what it would take.
item.excerpt:encoded: Start a scoping conversation. No deck, no pitch.

item.title: Georgia Runoffs
item.dc:creator: dheeraj
item.content:encoded: In the 2021 Georgia Senate runoffs, Siege Analytics built a statewide spatial targeting model for AAPI Victory Fund that identified 65,000 persuadable AAPI voters across all 159 counties. The model produced a 2.9x turnout lift over untargeted outreach.
item.excerpt:encoded: Statewide spatial targeting for AAPI Victory Fund in the 2021 Georgia Senate runoffs.

item.title: Boundary Estimation
item.dc:creator: dheeraj
item.content:encoded: Most states do not publish precinct boundaries as shapefiles. Siege Analytics reconstructs them from raw voter-file addresses using a three-phase pipeline: geocode, cluster, and estimate polygons. The result is a set of estimated precinct boundaries accurate enough for campaign targeting, resource allocation, and election-night reporting.
item.excerpt:encoded: Reconstructing precinct boundaries from raw voter-file addresses when official shapefiles do not exist.

item.title: Polling as Ethnography
item.dc:creator: dheeraj
item.content:encoded: Traditional polling treats respondents as interchangeable data points. Siege Analytics treats every community as a first language -- designing instruments, sampling frames, and fieldwork protocols that respect how people actually talk about politics, place, and power.
item.excerpt:encoded: Designing polls that treat every community as a first language.
